name: Upcoming Movies & Recommendations
description: Adds a 'Discover' page to Jellyfin with Upcoming Movies (TMDB), Personalized Recommendations, and your Watchlist. Nav placement (header or sidebar) is configurable. Supports Jellyseerr requests and direct streaming.
overview: A native Jellyfin plugin that injects a Discover page showing upcoming TMDB movies, personalized recommendations (based on watch history), and your KefinTweaks-compatible Watchlist. Nav placement (header/sidebar) is configurable in settings. Each card supports Request on Jellyseerr and Stream Directly actions.

versions.changelog: Initial release. Discover page with Upcoming, Recommended, and Watchlist sections. Header/sidebar nav placement configurable in plugin settings.
